name: woohyuk-coding-plugin
description: Personal Codex workflows for review, design implementation, documentation, PRs, changelogs, testing, release checks, and commit messages.

interface.shortDescription: Review, design, docs, PR, and release workflows.
interface.longDescription: Woohyuk Coding Plugin provides personal Codex skills for reviewing code, using Pencil .pen design files, maintaining README files, documenting project architecture, writing ADRs, planning tests, running visual QA, checking public release readiness, drafting commit messages, preparing PR content, updating changelogs, and checking documentation consistency.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use woohyuk-coding-plugin for code review, Pencil design implementation, docs, PRs, changelogs, tests, release checks, or commit messages.
